name: @pascal-app/lovelace-card
description: Home Assistant Lovelace card for Pascal viewer artifacts

scripts.build: bun build ./src/pascal-viewer-card.tsx --target=browser --format=esm --minify --outfile=dist/pascal-viewer-card.js --banner="var process = { env: { NEXT_PUBLIC_ASSETS_CDN_URL: 'https://editor.pascal.app', NODE_ENV: 'production' } };" --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"'
scripts.build:hacs: bun run build && bun run prepare:hacs
